metadata.description: Immutable baseline sourced from the current golden flow. Locks in the invoice-list selection so any future drift in the selection instructions or inventory is caught as a regression.
metadata.inputProvenance: FlowSpec docs/examples/flowspec-dryrun-01.json (step 'invoice-list') resolved by docs/layers/20-selection/ai-pattern-selection-instructions.md into docs/examples/selectionspec-dryrun-02.json (screen 'invoice-list'); dry-run #2, 2026-07-11. Do not edit; add new cases as separate files instead.

risks: collection-table-01 lacks permission-denied and rtl coverage (risk.missingStates); the data-driven-screen rule requires permission-denied before production use.
